summary: A small rectangular structure with a stepped pyramid roof. The building features a wooden plank wall with glass windows, a stonebrick foundation and trim, and a dark nether brick roof with multiple stepped layers. The structure sits on a raised platform with a dirt foundation.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof
shape.symmetry: bilateral symmetry along length and width axes

rebuild_hints: Create a rectangular foundation using stonebrick, approximately 8×6 blocks
Build wooden plank walls 3-4 blocks high around the perimeter
Place glass windows symmetrically on front and back walls (2 windows each)
Construct stepped pyramid roof using nether brick, starting with full-width base layer and reducing by 1 block per side for each layer upward
Ensure roof has 3-4 stepped layers to reach peak
Add stonebrick slab or block trim at base of walls where they meet foundation
Surround structure with dirt platform at ground level
uncertainties: Exact window placement and count on sides/back not fully visible
Precise block count for roof layers difficult to determine from angles shown
Whether foundation is solid stonebrick or mixed with other materials
Exact height of foundation platform uncertain
